summary: Completed testing of Word Search scoring bug fixes. All 18 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: BUG FIX 1 VERIFIED: Backend word_search validation (lines 1039-1053) now correctly matches submitted word against game_payload.hints[].word instead of original quiz answers

BUG FIX 2 VERIFIED: Backend complete_session (lines 1149-1165) calculates total_questions based on game type payload (words.length for word_search, pairs.length for memory/matching, items.length for sequence)
BUG FIX 3 VERIFIED: Frontend handleGameComplete (lines 1149-1175) calculates totalQ based on game type (words.length for word_search)
Sequence validation (lines 1052-1067) correctly validates submitted position against correct_position
Memory game validation (lines 1069-1072) marks all answers as correct since client already validated matches
seed_data_creation: Created new Word Search, Sequence, and Memory sessions for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Word Search scoring bugs fully fixed and tested. Key verifications: (1) Submitting 'MELANCHOLY' is marked correct when expected word is MELANCHOLY, (2) Completion returns total_questions=5 for 5-word Word Search (not base_items=10), (3) accuracy_percent=100% and missed_count=0 when all words found, (4) Sequence position validation works correctly, (5) Memory game answers always marked correct.

word_search_answer_validation.description: Submitting exact word (e.g., 'ABUNDANT') is marked correct

word_search_lowercase_validation.description: Submitting lowercase word (e.g., 'perseverance') is also marked correct

word_search_completion_total_questions.description: Completion endpoint returns total_questions=5 (words count), not base_items

sequence_position_validation.description: Submitting correct position index is marked correct
sequence_position_validation.evidence: Backend validates answer against correct_position field

memory_always_correct.description: Memory game answers always marked correct (client validated)
memory_always_correct.evidence: Backend returns is_correct=true for any answer

frontend_ui.description: Word Search game UI shows correct word count (5 words), grid, hints, and progress indicator
frontend_ui.evidence: Screenshot shows '0 / 5 found' progress indicator matching words array length
